bird.name: 非洲八色鸫
bird.summary: 非洲八色鸫（学名：Pitta angolensis），是八色鸫科八色鸫属的一种全面迁徙的候鸟，其种加词“angolensis”意为“安哥拉的”。分布于津巴布韦、加蓬、埃塞俄比亚、赤道几内亚、赞比亚、科特迪瓦、安哥拉、多哥、南非、卢旺达、喀麦隆、加纳、中非共和国、尼日利亚、利比里…

locations.name: 西部區 (烏干達)
locations.summary: 西部區是非洲中部國家烏干達的四個用作行政用途的地理區之一，首府是姆巴拉拉，截至2010年7月下分26區，該區面積49,599平方公里，2002年人口6,417,449。

locations.name: Budongo Forest
locations.summary: The Budongo Forest in Uganda is northwest of the capital city Kampala on the way to Murchison Falls National Park and i…

locations.name: 格迪古鎮和考古遺址
locations.summary: 格迪古鎮和考古遺址（英語：The Historic Town and Archaeological Site of Gedi），或稱格迪遺址（英語：Ruins of Gedi），是一個位在肯亞東部印度洋沿岸地區現代城鎮格迪旁邊的歷史和考古…

locations.name: Minziro Forest Reserve
locations.summary: The Minziro (Nature) Forest Reserve is a 24,841 ha (95.91 sq mi) forest reserve in Tanzania along the Kagera River in B…

locations.name: Rukwa Valley
locations.summary: The Rukwa Valley is a valley located in Rukwa Region, Songwe Region and Katavi Region in southwestern Tanzania.

locations.name: 魯菲吉河
locations.summary: 魯菲吉河（Rufiji River）是非洲坦桑尼亞的河流，河道全長約600公里，發源自坦桑尼亞西南部，而河口在馬菲亞島附近注入印度洋，主要的支流有大魯阿哈河，可讓船隻航行的河道長約100公里。 魯菲吉河位於達累斯薩拉姆以南約200公里，河…

relations.subject: 非洲八色鸫
relations.evidence: longipennis spends the austral winter in the western Ugandan forests as far north as Budongo, and coastal Kenya as far north as Gedi ruins. A bird found at Minziro Forest in northwestern Tanzania was in heavy moult, suggestive that the area is on the southeastern fringe of the non-breeding range. They arrive in southern Africa from late October, though mainly in November and early December. They seldom breed north of the Rukwa Valley and Rufiji River in Tanzania, and no further south than central Mozambique
